# Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Brief description of your changes. What does this PR do?

## 🔗 Related Issues

Fixes #123
Related to #456

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (adds functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (improves docs)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 📈 Performance improvement

## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Changes are well-commented and documented
- [ ] No console warnings or errors

### Testing
- [ ] Tests have been added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass (`flutter test`)
- [ ] Code coverage is maintained or improved
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Screenshots/videos added (if UI changes)

### General
- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with main
- [ ] Commits have clear messages
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Tested on device/emulator
- [ ] Privacy considerations reviewed (if handling user data)

## 🧪 Testing

How did you test these changes? What manual testing was performed?

## 📸 Screenshots / Video (if applicable)

Add screenshots or videos showing the changes.

## 🎯 Breaking Changes

Any breaking changes to the API or data structure?

## 📌 Notes

Any additional notes or context for reviewers?

---

**Thank you for contributing to Liora!** 🌸
